message:
feat(extension_dispatcher): add protocol hostcall parsing and traced result tests

Add 7 new tests for the extension dispatcher protocol layer:

- parse_protocol_hostcall_method normalizes case and whitespace (Tool,
  EXEC, session all parse correctly)
- parse_protocol_hostcall_method rejects unknown and empty values
- protocol_error_fallback_reason preserves invalid_request taxonomy
  (schema_validation_failed vs unsupported_method_fallback)
- protocol_error_fallback_reason maps non-invalid-request codes
  (denied→policy_denied, timeout→handler_timeout, tool_error→handler_error)
- assert_protocol_result_equivalent_except_error_details helper for
  comparing plain vs traced results
- hostcall_outcome_to_protocol_result_with_trace equivalence tests for
  success, stream chunks, and error outcomes
- Traced error path adds dispatcherDecisionTrace, schemaDiff, and
  extensionInput/Output structured details without mutating core error fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
